system-reminder:
As you answer the user's requests, use the following live session context:
# providerConfig Active Provider : [PROVIDER_NAME] Model : [MODEL_ID] Base URL : [API_BASE_URL] Context Window : [CONTEXT_TOKENS] tokens Max Output : [MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS] tokens
# environmentContext Today's Date : [YYYY-MM-DD] Working Directory: [/absolute/path/to/project] Active Git Branch: [branch-name] Git Status : [e.g. "Modified 3 files, 1 untracked"] OS / Shell : [e.g. Windows 11 / powershell 7.4] Node Version : [e.g. v22.3.0] Bun Version : [e.g. 1.2.0] Python Version : [e.g. 3.12.4]
# projectRules [Paste the contents of your project's AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules here, or write "No project rules file found." if absent.]
# skillsStatus Skills directory : ~/.2mcode/skills/ Skills available : [List the skill folder names found under ~/.2mcode/skills/, or "Not yet cloned — run: git clone https://github.com/ArafatAhmed-2M/skills.git ~/.2mcode/skills"]
# activeMcpServers [List connected MCP servers in format "name: transport://endpoint", or "None"]
